area: Task id alias resolution / FABLE shorthand
finding: `next --prompt` does not resolve shorthand task ids such as `FABLE-004` or `FABLE-005` to imported ledger tasks named `TASK-AAO-FABLE-004` / `TASK-AAO-FABLE-005`, even though direct `tasks status --task TASK-AAO-FABLE-004` works.
expectedBehavior: Task-id alias expansion should understand imported task-family suffixes and map shorthand labels to unique matching ledger task ids; if multiple families match, it should return selection-required rather than scope-not-found.
evidenceOrRepro: Fixed on 2026-07-13: prompt scoring now treats a mentioned shorthand as a task-id suffix match, so `FABLE-004` can resolve to `TASK-AAO-FABLE-004` without requiring the full task id. `validate-prompt-scoped-next` covers `FABLE-004` and `AAO-FABLE-005` shorthand routing.
followUp: Keep suffix shorthand matching below exact task-id priority so ambiguous same-suffix cases continue to require selection instead of silently choosing a task.
